name: Bug report
about: Report a problem to help us improve Council
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run '...'
2. With config '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error output or logs (redact any secrets).

## Environment

- Council version: <!-- e.g. 0.1.0 (run `council --version`) -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04 -->
- Node.js version: <!-- run `node --version`; must be 22+ -->
- pnpm version: <!-- run `pnpm --version` -->

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or related issues here.
